parameters.query:
SELECT 
  sr.id,
  sr.search_name,
  sr.title,
  sr.description,
  sr.url,
  sr.published_at
FROM s_meetup.search_results sr
INNER JOIN s_meetup.searches_monitored sm ON sm.id = sr.search_id
WHERE sm.active = TRUE 
  AND sr.published_at >= NOW() 
  AND sr.published_at <= NOW() + INTERVAL '7 days'
ORDER BY sr.search_name, sr.published_at ASC;
